designerInstructions: Use uploaded target evidence, tapped aim point, and tapped impacts to generate backend authority package.
printedTargetText: Shoot / Save / Scan / Improve QR instructions are printed on target.
instructionAuthority.intendedUse: Smart target evidence capture with score, POIB, correction clicks, group, evidence hash, and shooter guidance.
instructionAuthority.shotCount: variable; current backend supports one or more impact points
passFailOrScoringRules: Backend authority package provides score, group, POIB, correction, clicks, guidance, evidence hash, and validation status.

aimPointRules: Backend uses tapped aim coordinate and impact coordinates.
scoringZones: Current backend score is authority-v1 distance-from-aim scoring, not official printed ring scoring.

minimumConfidenceRequirements: At least one impact must be tapped.
Backend authority response must validate before Save Session.

unknowns.neededSource: Official Baker target scoring ring/zone dimensions if different from current backend scoring model.
Designer scoring standard for pass/fail or proficiency levels.

sourceAudit.notes: Current production target image and measured grid geometry.
Current backend uses Baker grid geometry and authority-v1 score/correction/guidance package.
Printed branding and QR workflow text.
